### 299. 极简东方风高端精华海报

<img src="images/ona_0173.jpg" alt="极简东方风高端精华海报" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
极简东方高级广告风格，高端护肤品牌KV海报，品牌名“BRAND”，整体气质纯净、克制、具有修护、再生、抗老与纯净科技感

画面中心为一款高端精华产品，玻璃瓶身，通透渐变质感（上部透明→下部冷调青绿色），液体质感清晰，搭配香槟金金属瓶盖，产品置于简洁圆形高光底座（抛光石材+金属质感），结构干净利落，边缘高光清晰锐利，强化产品轮廓与体积感，作为绝对视觉中心

产品周围仅保留少量精致金色能量光环与极细流动光带（控制粒子数量，避免过多装饰），形成克制的轻微S型动线，从产品向外扩散，象征修护与再生能量（光效干净、有序、不杂乱）

一位东方女性位于画面后方偏右，半身回眸侧脸，气质冷静优雅，五官精致自然，冷白细腻肌肤呈现真实通透光泽（强调护肤效果），妆容极简高级，避免过多高光

黑色长发轻微流动，发丝干净利落，仅少量微弱金色光点点缀，与产品光效产生微妙联系（去除复杂花朵装饰，整体更克制）

身穿半透明丝绸服装，结构简洁，材质通透，带非常轻微金属光泽与柔和反光，避免过强纹理

光影系统为真实摄影棚光效（studio lighting），暖金色主光源从侧后方照射，产品为主光聚焦点，人物为辅助受光，边缘光干净利落，体积光极弱，仅保留空间通透感，整体光线控制精准不过曝

背景为极简浅色渐变（米白+暖金），大面积干净留白，无多余粒子与装饰，强化广告排版空间

画面底部加入克制的冷调青绿色水面或矿物质切片元素（低细节、低对比），作为品牌“纯净科技”象征，但不抢视觉中心

色彩体系严格控制：主色为米白+金色，点缀冷调青绿色与香槟金，整体低饱和、高级、统一

构图为稳定中心构图，弱化动态夸张，整体趋于平衡与高级静态表达，视觉层级清晰（产品 > 光 > 人物 > 环境）

整体风格：国际高端护肤品牌视觉（类似La Mer / HR / SK-II），强调真实质感与克制表达

超精细，8K质感，商业摄影级真实材质表现

负面：金色粒子过多，装饰复杂，产品模糊，边缘发虚，画面拥挤，光影混乱，颜色杂乱，廉价质感，过曝
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Minimalist Eastern high-end advertising style, high-end skincare brand KV poster, brand name "BRAND", overall temperament pure, restrained, with repair, regeneration, anti-aging and pure technology sense
The center of the picture is a high-end essence product, glass bottle body, transparent gradient texture (upper transparent -> lower cold-toned cyan-green), liquid texture is clear, paired with a champagne gold metal bottle cap, the product is placed on a simple circular highlight base (polished stone + metal texture), the structure is clean and neat, edge highlights are clear and sharp, strengthening the product outline and volume sense, as the absolute visual center
Only a small number of exquisite golden energy halos and extremely thin flowing light bands are kept around the product (control the number of particles, avoid excessive decoration), forming a restrained slight S-shaped movement line, spreading outward from the product, symbolizing repair and regeneration energy (light effects are clean, orderly, not cluttered)
An Eastern woman is located slightly to the right behind the picture, half-body looking back with side face, calm and elegant temperament, delicate and natural facial features, cold white and delicate skin presenting a real transparent luster (emphasizing skincare effects), minimalist and high-end makeup, avoiding excessive highlights
Black long hair flows slightly, hair strands are clean and neat, only a small number of faint golden light dots embellish, creating a subtle connection with the product light effects (remove complex flower decorations, overall more restrained)
Wearing semi-transparent silk clothing, simple structure, transparent material, with a very slight metallic luster and soft reflection, avoiding overly strong textures
The light and shadow system is a real studio lighting effect (studio lighting), the warm golden main light source illuminates from the side and rear, the product is the main light focus point, the character is auxiliary light-receiving, the edge light is clean and neat, the volumetric light is extremely weak, only retaining the spatial transparency sense, the overall light control is precise without overexposure
The background is a minimalist light-colored gradient (off-white + warm gold), a large area of clean negative space, no redundant particles and decorations, strengthening the advertising layout space
The bottom of the picture adds restrained cold-toned cyan-green water surface or mineral slice elements (low detail, low contrast), as a symbol of the brand's "pure technology", but not stealing the visual center
The color system is strictly controlled: the main color is off-white + gold, embellished with cold-toned cyan-green and champagne gold, overall low saturation, high-end, unified
The composition is a stable center composition, weakening dynamic exaggeration, the overall tends to balance and high-end static expression, visual hierarchy is clear (product > light > character > environment)
Overall style: international high-end skincare brand visual (similar to La Mer / HR / SK-II), emphasizing real texture and restrained expression
Ultra-fine, 8K texture, commercial photography-level real material performance
Negative: too many golden particles, complex decorations, blurry product, fuzzy edges, crowded picture, chaotic light and shadow, messy colors, cheap texture, overexposure
```

### 300. 英伦牛排店的手绘笔记美食照

<img src="images/ona_0174.jpg" alt="英伦牛排店的手绘笔记美食照" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
生成一张英国牛排店风格的牛排和甜点的照片。像是用智能手机拍摄的、适合发到Instagram的照片。没有人物。然后，观察照片中出现的元素，并为每个元素添加有意义的手绘注释。 
【描写规则】
・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条
・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀
・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线
・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导
【文本规则】
・英文手写文字 
・简短，像自言自语一样的评论
・语气是“日记・一言・情感寄托”
【评论生成规则】
・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）
・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）
・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）
・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）
【装饰】
・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加
・不过度，留出“空白”
【完成风格】
・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风 ・时尚且轻松的氛围
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Generate a photo of steak and dessert in a British steakhouse style. Like a photo taken with a smartphone, suitable for posting on Instagram. No people. Then, observe the elements appearing in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each element. 
【Drawing Rules】
・Thin hand-drawn lines like drawn with a white pen
・Rough, slightly uneven one-stroke writing style
・Add outlines like tracing the outer circumference of objects
・Create visual guidance with arrows or dashed lines
【Text Rules】
・English handwritten text 
・Short, comments like talking to oneself
・Tone is "diary, one-liner, emotional outlet"
【Comment Generation Rules】
・Beverage → Taste, temperature, mood (Example: refreshing, gentle sweetness)
・Food → Texture, deliciousness (Example: moist, the best)
・Space → Atmosphere (Example: relaxing, wonderful time)
・Overall → One-line summary (Example: too happy~)
【Decorations】
・Moderately add steam, sparkles, hearts, small emojis, etc.
・Not excessive, leave "white space"
【Final Style】
・Instagram story style, rough note style of a magazine, stylish and relaxed atmosphere
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 牛排店 · 手绘风 · 杂志感 · 美食照 · 英伦风

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-25

📎 **来源：** [@axichuhai](https://x.com/axichuhai/status/2047662271266996592)

</details>

### 305. 濒危动物逼真视觉图鉴

<img src="images/ona_0179.jpg" alt="濒危动物逼真视觉图鉴" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
创建一个关于濒危动物的视觉丰富的信息图。首先在网上找一个，研究它的栖息地、饮食和独特特征。通过带有注释的视觉效果和结构化的标注来呈现信息，而不是通用的板块。将其风格化为粗犷的图形插图：以一个详细的、逼真的中心动物作为焦点，由图表、标注和简洁的文本元素支撑。使用干净的背景，并在分层构图中将逼真感与强烈的图形元素（形状、图标、色块）混合在一起。使其密集、具有触感且专业制作。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Create a visually rich infographic about an endangered animal. Start by finding one online, research its habitat, diet, and unique traits. Present information through annotated visuals and structured callouts, not generic sections. Style it like a bold graphic illustration: a detailed, photorealistic central animal as the focal point, supported by diagrams, callouts, and concise text elements. Use clean backgrounds and a mix of photorealism with strong graphic elements (shapes, icons, color blocking) in a layered composition. Make it dense, tactile, and professionally authored.
```

### 312. 逆光白纱的日系浪漫

<img src="images/ona_0186.jpg" alt="逆光白纱的日系浪漫" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
9:16，日系胶片摄影，富士美学，在ISO 800下迫冲富士Pro 400H拍摄，全画面具有明显的可见胶片颗粒，温暖而亲密。一位迷人的韩国女偶像穿着性感的现代象牙白婚纱，在黄金时刻于户外开阔的野花草地中被拍摄，身后落日形成强烈的逆光。   她以自信的身体扭转姿势站立——上半身面向镜头，重心移至右臀，左膝微曲。她的连衣裙是贴合身材的鱼尾轮廓，深V领露出锁骨，极细的   细吊带，戏剧性的露背设计露出整个背部，右侧有开到大腿根部的开叉，随着裙摆分开露出她修长的腿。这件连衣裙由象牙色丝绸缎面制成，带有捕捉   逆光的透明薄纱覆盖层，创造出明亮的光辉。一条精致的珍珠腰链位于她纤细的腰部。一层教堂长度的半透明薄纱头纱从她脑后延伸，被风吹起像白帆一样向上鼓起——阳光    穿透头纱，在她头部和肩部周围形成一个巨大的、梦幻的漫射光晕。   她直视镜头，露出灿烂、真诚的杜兴微笑——她的眼角温暖地弯曲，露出牙齿，眼神明亮而快乐，仿佛她爱的人刚刚呼唤了她的名字。她的目光温暖而诱人，带着一丝微妙   俏皮的光芒。她的左手抬起，手指轻轻触碰脸旁漂浮的头纱，这是一个毫不费力、既优雅又自然的姿态。她的右手放在身侧靠近裙子开叉的地方。   逆光强烈而金黄——位于她正后方约10-15度低角度的太阳产生了：   1. 透过她头纱的明亮金色光晕，环绕着她的头部和上半身   2. 强烈的轮廓光，用温暖的金色勾勒出她的头发、裸露的肩膀和背部   3. 在她被风吹动的头发中形成天使般的光环   4. 耳朵边缘和手指上微妙的次表面散射   5. 阳光穿过的地方，她裙子的薄纱覆盖层发出半透明的金色光芒   6. 自然的温暖镜头眩光，带有进入画面的柔和金色光线   她的脸部由来自环境反射的柔和自然补光照亮——冷粉调的富士肤色散发出健康和温暖的光泽，没有生硬的阴影。她的头发随风飘动，深棕色的发丝自由飞舞，每一根都被逆光   勾勒出金色的边缘。   背景：在f/1.4光圈下完全融化为奶油般的散景——金黄色草地的柔和渲染、模糊的野花、远处的树木剪影，以及温暖过曝的天空。她身后的一切都融化成印象派的色块。   富士Pro 400H迫冲至ISO 800的色彩科学——明显的可见胶片颗粒（0.4-0.5）覆盖整个图像，在阴影区域尤为明显。冷粉肤色（富士标志性特征），绿色呈现为清新的青蓝色，高光   为温暖的蜜桃金（来自逆光），阴影偏向紫蓝色。低对比度（0.8），稍微提升黑位以营造柔和的雾面胶片感。颗粒增加了质感和温度——感觉就像你在日本   时尚杂志上能看到的一张真实照片。   强烈的自然暗角（0.35）将视线吸引到她明亮的脸庞和周围的光晕上。35mm镜头在f/1.4光圈下，浅景深具有典型的圆形富士龙散景，边缘有轻微温暖的桶形畸变。一阵微风吹起她的头纱和裙子。她正在对着相机后面的某个人大笑。整个画面散发着欢乐、温暖和自信的美——一个阳光沐浴、充满颗粒感、不完美的完美瞬间。   杰作，最佳质量，杂志大片级新娘摄影，日系胶片美学，富士迫冲颗粒感外观，8K超高清，照片级真实，准确的黄金逆光渲染，半透明头纱的光线透射，逆光下的独立发丝，带有眼角弯曲的自然杜兴微笑，全画面可见胶片颗粒。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
9:16, Japanese-style film photograph, Fujifilm aesthetic, shot on pushed Fuji Pro 400H at ISO 800 prominent visible film grain throughout, warm and intimate. A stunning Korean female idol wearing a sexy modern ivory wedding dress, photographed outdoors in an open wildflower meadow during golden hour, strong backlight from the setting sun behind her.   She stands in a confident body-twist pose — upper body facing the camera, weight shifted to her right hip, left knee slightly bent. Her dress is a form-fitting mermaid silhouette with a deep V-neckline revealing her collarbones, ultra-thin   spaghetti straps, a dramatic open back exposing her entire back, and a thigh-high slit on the right side revealing her long leg as the skirt fabric parts. The dress is made of ivory silk satin with a sheer tulle overlay that catches the   backlight, creating a luminous glow. A delicate pearl waist chain sits at her narrow waist. A single-layer cathedral-length veil of translucent tulle extends behind her head, caught by the wind and billowing upward like a white sail — sunlight    streaming through the veil creates a massive, dreamy halo of diffused light around her head and shoulders.   She looks directly at the camera with a radiant, genuine Duchenne smile — her eyes crinkle warmly at the corners, teeth showing, eyes bright and happy, as if someone she loves just called her name. Her gaze is warm and inviting with a subtle   playful spark. Her left hand is raised, fingers gently touching the floating veil near her face, an effortless gesture that's both elegant and natural. Her right hand rests at her side near the slit of the dress.   The backlight is powerful and golden — the low-angle sun at about 10-15 degrees directly behind her creates:   1. A bright golden halo through her veil that wraps around her head and upper body   2. Strong rim light outlining her hair, bare shoulders, and back in warm gold   3. An angelic ring of light in her wind-blown hair   4. Subtle subsurface scattering on her ear edges and fingers   5. The tulle overlay of her dress glowing translucent gold where sunlight passes through   6. Natural warm lens flare with soft golden light streaks entering the frame   Her face is lit by soft natural fill light from environmental reflection — cool pink-toned Fujifilm skin that glows with health and warmth, no harsh shadows. Her hair is wind-swept, dark brown strands flying freely, each one outlined in gold   by the backlight.   Background: completely dissolved into creamy bokeh at f/1.4 — soft washes of golden-green meadow, blurred wildflowers, distant tree silhouettes, and a warm overexposed sky. Everything behind her melts into impressionistic color fields.   Fuji Pro 400H pushed to ISO 800 color science — prominent visible film grain (0.4-0.5) coating the entire image, especially noticeable in shadow areas. Cool pink skin tones (Fujifilm signature), greens rendered in fresh teal-cyan, highlights   in warm peach-gold (from backlight), shadows leaning violet-blue. Low contrast (0.8), slightly lifted black point for a gentle foggy film feel. The grain adds texture and warmth — it feels like a real photograph you'd find in a Japanese   fashion magazine.   Strong natural vignette (0.35) drawing the eye toward her luminous face and the halo around her. 35mm lens at f/1.4, shallow depth of field with characteristically rounded Fujinon bokeh, slight warm barrel distortion at edges.A breeze lifts her veil and dress. She is laughing at someone behind the camera. The whole frame radiates joy, warmth, and confident beauty a sundrenched, grainy, imperfectly perfect moment.   Masterpiece, best quality, editorial bridal photography, Japanese film aesthetic, Fujifilm pushed grain look, 8K UHD, photorealistic, accurate golden backlight rendering, translucent veil light transmission, individual hair strands in   backlight, natural Duchenne smile with eye crinkles, visible film grain throughout.
```

### 313. 草莓奶昔双生少女拼接照

<img src="images/ona_0187.jpg" alt="草莓奶昔双生少女拼接照" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
它创作了两个女孩，没有改变她们的脸部，使她们成为参考图像的精确复制品。两张水平照片的写实拼接画，具有极佳的皮肤细节、自然的面部纹理、明亮的阳光和生活方式编辑美学。构图的中心焦点是一个单独的玻璃杯，它连接了两个画框并创造了视觉错觉。一个装有草莓奶昔的透明塑料杯位于上下画框之间的边缘。下面第一张照片中的女孩从下画框向上伸出她的手臂，并在腰部水平握住杯子。她的手腕上戴着一条细手链。她的手穿过画框之间的空间，仿佛她正在向上倾倒饮料。一根浅色的吸管从杯子中伸出，指向上画框中上方女孩的嘴唇。上面第二张上传照片中的女孩通过吸管喝饮料，她的嘴唇微微噘起，营造出同一女孩的两个版本正在互动的印象。玻璃杯里装满了草莓奶昔，透明杯壁上可见冷凝水和光线反射。这个元素正好位于构图的中心，将两张图像结合成一个富有创意的镜头。
图像：上方镜头：一个女孩将头发向后梳成一个高耸、蓬松且随意的发髻，柔和的波浪和散落的发丝环绕着她的脸。她戴着窄边透明无框眼镜。服装：一件宽松的黄色圆领T恤，带有及肘的短袖。胸前有一个极简的猫图案。
下方镜头：非常长、直且光滑的头发，中分。大号光滑的黑色太阳镜。嘴唇呈亲吻姿势噘起。她的手腕上戴着一条手链。她穿着一件宽松的绿色城市风格T恤，胸前有一个黑白相间的大图案：下面是单词“CATS”。它宽松合身，带有短袖。
背景：一栋优雅高耸的黑色砖块建筑，略微失焦。RA. 9:16。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
It creates two girls, without altering their faces, making them exact replicas of the reference image. A photorealistic diptych of two horizontal shots, with great skin detail, natural facial texture, bright sunlight, and a lifestyle editorial aesthetic. The central focus of the composition is a single glass, which connects both frames and creates a visual illusion. A clear plastic cup with a strawberry milkshake sits on the edge between the upper and lower frames. The girl below, in the first photo, extends her arm upward from the lower frame and holds the cup at waist level. She wears a thin bracelet on her wrist. Her hand passes through the space between the frames, as if she is pouring the drink upward. A light-colored straw emerges from the cup, pointing toward the upper frame directly at the lips of the girl above. The girl above, in the second uploaded photo, drinks through the straw, her lips slightly pursed, creating the impression that two versions of the same girl are interacting. The glass is filled with a strawberry milkshake, with condensation and light reflections visible on the transparent walls. This element is positioned right in the center of the composition, uniting both images into a single creative shot.
Image: Top shot: A girl with her hair pulled back in a high, voluminous, and casual bun, with soft waves and loose strands framing her face. She wears narrow, transparent, rimless glasses. Clothing: An oversized yellow crew-neck T-shirt with short, elbow-length sleeves. On the chest, a minimalist cat print.
Bottom shot: Very long, straight, and sleek hair, parted in the middle. Large, glossy black sunglasses. Lips pursed in a kissing pose. She wears a bracelet on her wrist. She wears an oversized green urban-style T-shirt with a large black and white print on the chest: the word "CATS" underneath. It is loose-fitting and has short sleeves.
background: An elegant, tall, black brick building, slightly out of focus. RA. 9:16.
```

### 314. 超现实巨型洞洞鞋时尚大片

<img src="images/ona_0188.jpg" alt="超现实巨型洞洞鞋时尚大片" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
一张为洞洞鞋制作的高级时尚超现实主义广告海报。场景设定在一个极简的、单色浅蓝色工作室中，带有半反射地板。
中心焦点是一只超大号的白色洞洞鞋，以其鞋跟为支撑点呈对角线角度放置，作为靠背。一位留着深色长发的时尚模特，穿着干净的全白色配套连帽衫和阔腿裤，以放松的倾斜姿势将整个背部靠在巨大的鞋子上。她面朝右侧呈侧面轮廓，带着宁静的表情向前看，穿着标准尺寸的白色洞洞鞋。
在背景中，以巨大、粗体、白色的 condensed 无衬线字体写着“CROCS”一词，部分被巨大的鞋子和模特遮挡以创造深度感。在右上角，“Designed with ChatGPT”
在底部中心，一条白色无衬线标语写道：“Made for comfort, worn for confidence. Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining.” 灯光柔和、清冷且均匀，在光滑的蓝色地板上投射出柔和的阴影和主体的柔和倒影。整体美学是干净、现代和高概念的。
将宽高比设为 3:4
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
A high-fashion surrealist advertising poster for Crocs. The scene is set in a minimalist, monochrome light blue studio with a semi-reflective floor. 
The central focus is an oversized, giant white Croc clog positioned on its heel at a diagonal angle, serving as a backrest. A fashion model with long dark hair, dressed in a clean, all-white coordinated sweatshirt and wide-leg trousers, leans her entire back against the giant shoe in a relaxed, leaning posture. She is facing right in profile, looking ahead with a serene expression, and wearing standard-sized white Crocs.
In the background, the word "CROCS" is written in massive, bold, white condensed sans-serif typography, partially occluded by the giant shoe and the model to create a sense of depth. At the  top right, "Designed with ChatGPT" 
At the bottom center, a white sans-serif tagline reads: "Made for comfort, worn for confidence. Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining." The lighting is soft, cool, and even, casting gentle shadows and a soft reflection of the subjects on the glossy blue floor. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and high-concept.

Make the aspect ratio 3:4
```

### 319. 奢华酒红高定礼服杂志封面

<img src="images/ona_0193.jpg" alt="奢华酒红高定礼服杂志封面" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
一个奢华的高级时尚杂志封面。杂志名称在最顶部以巨大的优雅衬线字体显示为"LUMIÈRE"——字母很大，略微透明/幽灵风格地与模特的头部重叠，就像《ELLE》杂志一样，采用柔和的铂金银色融入背景。
角色：一位年轻美丽的白人女性，20岁出头，柔和的女性特征，蓝色大眼睛，自然丰满的嘴唇，无瑕的瓷白肌肤，淡妆——玫瑰色脸颊，裸色嘴唇，立体的眉毛。她的头发是铂金色的，长而卷曲，松散地垂在一侧肩上。她直视镜头，目光柔和而有力。头部轻微倾斜，姿态自然而优雅。
服装：她穿着一件引人注目的深勃艮第酒红色舞会礼服——带有露肩领口的塑形紧身胸衣上衣，巨大的分层缎面裙摆在她周围戏剧性地飘扬。在她的肩膀后方，巨大的雕塑感面料像玫瑰花瓣一样升起——与参考图具有相同的建筑戏剧性。她微微前倾，双手轻轻放在膝盖上。
背景：纯净柔和的暖白色/象牙色背景——完全干净、极简、高端影棚大片。柔和的漫射光，没有刺眼的阴影。
排版——完全像《ELLE》杂志参考图一样放置：
顶部："LUMIÈRE"巨大衬线体，铂金/银色，略微重叠模特的头部
左中："GRACE & POWER"粗体衬线体，然后下方较小的"THE NEW VISION OF LUXURY"
右中："TIMELESS & FEARLESS"粗体，然后下方较小的"PURE OPULENCE"
右下大字："ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE"优雅的大号衬线体
所有文字均为深炭色/深海军蓝。字体风格：经典的高级时尚衬线体——与《ELLE》具有相同的粗细、间距和优雅感。文字自然地融入构图中，而不是随机漂浮。
超写实，8K，真实杂志封面质量，完美的排版放置，竖版 9:13 格式。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
A luxury high-fashion magazine cover. Magazine name at the very top in massive elegant serif font reads "LUMIÈRE" — the letters are large, slightly transparent/ghost-style overlapping the model's head just like ELLE magazine, in soft platinum silver color blending into the background.
Character: A young beautiful white woman, early 20s, soft feminine features, big blue eyes, naturally full lips, flawless porcelain skin, subtle makeup — rosy cheeks, nude lips, defined brows. Her hair is platinum blonde, long and wavy, loosely flowing over one shoulder. She looks directly into the camera with a soft yet powerful gaze. Slight tilt of the head, naturally elegant posture.
Outfit: She is wearing a dramatic deep burgundy wine-red ballgown — structured corset top with off-shoulder neckline, voluminous layered satin skirt billowing around her dramatically. Behind her shoulders, large sculptural fabric rises like rose petals — same architectural drama as reference. She leans slightly forward, both hands resting gently on her knees.
Background: Pure soft warm white/ivory background — completely clean, minimal, high-end studio editorial. Soft diffused light, no harsh shadows.
Typography — placed EXACTLY like ELLE magazine reference:
Top: "LUMIÈRE" massive serif, platinum/silver, overlapping model's head slightly
Left mid: "GRACE & POWER" bold serif, then smaller below "THE NEW VISION OF LUXURY"
Right mid: "TIMELESS & FEARLESS" bold, then "PURE OPULENCE" smaller below
Bottom right large: "ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE" elegant large serif
All text in deep charcoal/dark navy. Font style: classic high fashion serif — same weight, spacing, and elegance as ELLE. Text naturally integrated into the composition, NOT floating randomly.
Ultra photorealistic, 8K, real magazine cover quality, perfect typography placement, vertical 9:13 format.
```

```
在地铁车厢内，一位年轻女性坐在靠近车门的座位上，低头专注于手机，展现出自然的状态，没有看向镜头。她穿着灰色紧身上衣、黑色短裙和白色运动鞋，长发自然垂落。人物位于画面右侧三分之一的位置，左侧有模糊的前景遮挡，营造偷拍视角。车门与扶手形成清晰的垂直线条，引导视线。整体为冷色调的地铁灯光，柔和的顶光，没有明显的强烈阴影，浅景深使主体清晰，背景略微虚化。画面具有真实相机的颗粒感和轻微不完美的构图，展现随手抓拍的真实瞬间，而非摆拍。

Inside the subway carriage, a young woman sits on a seat near the door, looking down and focused on her phone, showing a natural state, not looking at the camera. She is wearing a gray tight top, a black short skirt, and white sneakers, with long hair falling naturally. The character is located in the right third of the frame, with a blurred foreground obstruction on the left, creating a candid shooting perspective. The door and handrails form clear vertical lines, guiding the line of sight. The overall tone is the cold-toned subway lighting, soft top light, without obvious strong shadows, shallow depth of field makes the subject clear, and the background is slightly blurred. The image has a real camera graininess and a slightly imperfect composition, showing a real moment of a casual snapshot, rather than a posed shot.
```

基于这个角色 [[ 角色名称 ]] 创建一个高细节的角色设定图 ・包含四视图：全身正面、侧面、半身镜头，以及背面 ・添加角色的面部表情变体 ( 4 种变体 ) ・拆解并展示服装的详细部分 ・添加一个调色板 添加一张面部的超大特写镜头 添加对他的性格的描述，所有的描述用日语书写 ・总体而言，使用有组织的布局 (白色背景，插画风格) 高分辨率，专业概念艺术风格 4k质量，赛璐璐阴影

```

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
创作一张以主角为特色的复古报纸最逼真的头版设计。布局应采用真实印刷报纸的风格，并具有电影般的黑白美学。
主照片应显眼地放置在中心，带有画框，就像文章标题中的图片一样。照片中的主体应保持不变，在自然光和略微增加的对比度下清晰可辨，以匹配引人注目的编辑风格。
在顶部创建一个醒目的、吸引眼球的标题（创建一个符合照片精神的独特标题——它可以是浪漫的、神秘的、有趣的或戏剧性的）。在其下方添加一个较小的副标题，看起来就像真实的报纸图片说明。
添加逼真的报纸元素：
小字文本栏（采用无意义占位符文本的风格，但排版像真实新闻一样）
顶部是虚构的出版物名称（例如，“The Daily Prompts”、“AI Times”或类似的——根据图片发挥创意）
日期、期号和地点
装饰线条、分隔线和复古排版
针对主图片的小型附加文章或说明
可选的印章、涂鸦或编辑注释以增加个性。
风格：
黑白或略微褪色的单色纸张
细腻的纸张纹理、颗粒感和墨水瑕疵
模仿真实印刷纸张的小阴影和折痕
整洁但略有磨损的复古报纸美学
情绪：赋予设计个性、表现力和情节，仿佛情节是主要文章的一部分。
宽高比：4:5 或 1:1
高细节、超逼真的编辑摄影与印刷设计的混合体。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic.
The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style.
Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption.
Add realistic newspaper elements:
Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news)
At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, “The Daily Prompts”, “AI Times” or similar - think creatively, according to the picture)
Date, issue number and location
Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography
Small additional articles or captions to the main image
Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality.
Style:
Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper
Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects
Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper
The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper
Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article.
Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1
High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 旧报纸 · 黑白风 · 超写实 · 复古感 · 排版术

📎 **来源：** [@Naiknelofar788](https://x.com/Naiknelofar788/status/2047207812800147647)

</details>

### 328. 暗黑奇幻阵营群像封面

<img src="images/ona_0202_1.jpg" alt="暗黑奇幻阵营群像封面" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0202_2.jpg" alt="暗黑奇幻阵营群像封面" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
请根据【主题：写人物名字】创作一张高完成度、高叙事张力、适合系列化发布的「暗潮群像封面 / Shadow Ensemble Cover」。

这不是普通角色插画，也不是简单的战斗海报，而是一张具有小说封面感、漫画主视觉感、游戏宣传感和暗黑奇幻插画感的“群像式动作封面”。画面需要通过一个巨大的精神核心人物、多个中景动作角色、背景威胁元素、局部能量光效和留白标题区，共同构成一个完整的角色阵营与世界观封面。

【基础设定】
主题：【主题，例如咒术战斗 / 暗黑西游 / 赛博猎人 / 山海经猎妖队 / 末日幸存者 / 魔法学院战斗团】
作品名：【作品名】
系列名 / 品牌名：【品牌名或系列名】
副标题：【副标题】
风格方向：【风格方向，例如暗黑奇幻、复古漫画封面、手绘厚涂、奇幻小说封面、游戏主视觉】
主色调：【主色调，例如墨绿黑灰 / 深蓝霓虹 / 暗棕金红 / 沙黄铁锈 / 深紫金色】
点缀色：【点缀色，例如血红能量、青绿色法术光、金色神光、蓝色雷电】
画幅比例：【画幅比例，例如2:3竖版 / 3:4竖版 / 4:5竖版 / 9:16竖版】

【画面结构】
采用竖版封面构图。画面中必须有一个体量巨大的主视觉人物，作为整张图的精神核心和气质压场元素。这个人物可以是侧脸、半身像、背影、正面凝视或巨大轮廓，占据画面右侧、上方或背景主区域，表情冷静、神秘、有压迫感，不一定参与战斗，但必须统领整张图的气质。

在中景安排3到6个动作角色，形成一个战斗阵营群像。角色之间需要有明确分工和姿态差异，例如冲锋、持刀、施法、防御、召唤、跳跃、警戒、远程攻击等。避免所有人物站桩，必须形成强烈的动作节奏和视觉动线。

背景中加入敌方威胁或世界观元素，例如怪物、巨兽、反派阴影、机械军团、妖魔、废墟、森林、异空间、战场烟雾或城市灾难。背景威胁不应喧宾夺主，而应像阴影一样包裹角色，增强危机感和叙事深度。

画面需要设置1到2个高饱和能量爆点，例如红色火焰拳、蓝色雷电、绿色诅咒气息、紫色魔法、金色神光或白色刀光。能量光效应集中在关键角色或关键武器上，形成视觉焦点，不要全画面平均发光。

【构图方式】
整体采用“大型精神核心人物 + 中景动作群像 + 背景威胁阴影 + 底部或侧边留白标题区”的结构。画面可以使用斜向动线组织角色，让角色群像从左上到右下、或从下方冲向中央，形成强烈推进感。

保留一块明显的留白标题区，建议位于左下、底部或画面侧边。留白区域使用米白、灰白、浅纸色或低饱和背景色，用于放置【品牌名 / 作品名 / 副标题】。标题排版应具有出版物封面感，可以使用优雅衬线字体、复古标题字、漫画封面标题或高级杂志式排版。文字区要清晰，不要被角色和背景完全遮挡。

插画边缘不要做成完整矩形铺满，可以使用不规则笔刷边缘、墨迹扩散、撕纸式留白或自然消散的方式，让角色和背景像从纸面中生长出来，增强手绘封面感和艺术质感。

【视觉风格】
整体风格应为手绘厚涂与漫画封面结合，具有纸张质感、笔触感、暗部层次和复古出版物气质。光影以低调暗光为主，背景压暗，人物轮廓清晰，局部能量光提供高对比焦点。画面不要过度干净，不要像普通AI光滑插画，应保留手绘纹理、纸张颗粒、边缘笔触和暗色雾气。

色彩上采用低饱和暗调为主，辅以少量高饱和能量色。整体氛围应具有压迫感、神秘感、战斗感和世界观厚度。

【画面目标】
最终画面应像一张成熟的奇幻小说封面、漫画特别篇封面、游戏角色阵营主视觉或IP宣传海报。它需要同时具备：
1. 清晰的主视觉人物；
2. 有动作节奏的角色群像；
3. 明确的敌方威胁或世界观背景；
4. 强烈但克制的能量光效；
5. 可阅读的标题文字区；
6. 复古手绘封面的整体质感。

请确保画面信息丰富但不混乱，角色层级清晰，视觉重心明确，阅读路径自然，适合后续替换主题继续生成同系列作品。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Please create a high-completion, high-narrative-tension, series-suitable "Shadow Ensemble Cover" based on [Theme: Write Character Name].

This is not an ordinary character illustration, nor a simple battle poster, but a "ensemble action cover" with a sense of novel cover, comic main visual, game promotional, and dark fantasy illustration. The image needs to combine a giant spiritual core character, multiple mid-ground action characters, background threat elements, local energy light effects, and a blank title area to form a complete character faction and worldview cover.

【Basic Settings】
Theme: [Theme, e.g., Jujutsu Battle / Dark Journey to the West / Cyber Hunter / Shanhai Jing Monster Hunting Squad / Doomsday Survivors / Magic Academy Combat Team]
Work Name: [Work Name]
Series Name / Brand Name: [Brand Name or Series Name]
Subtitle: [Subtitle]
Style Direction: [Style Direction, e.g., Dark Fantasy, Retro Comic Cover, Hand-painted Impasto, Fantasy Novel Cover, Game Main Visual]
Main Color Tone: [Main Color Tone, e.g., Ink Green Black Gray / Deep Blue Neon / Dark Brown Gold Red / Sand Yellow Rust / Deep Purple Gold]
Accent Color: [Accent Color, e.g., Blood Red Energy, Cyan-Green Magic Light, Golden Divine Light, Blue Lightning]
Aspect Ratio: [Aspect Ratio, e.g., 2:3 Vertical / 3:4 Vertical / 4:5 Vertical / 9:16 Vertical]

【Image Structure】
Adopt a vertical cover composition. There must be a massive main visual character in the image, serving as the spiritual core and atmospheric dominant element of the entire image. This character can be a side face, half-body portrait, back view, front gaze, or giant silhouette, occupying the right side, upper side, or main background area of the image, with a calm, mysterious, and oppressive expression, not necessarily participating in combat, but must dominate the atmosphere of the entire image.

Arrange 3 to 6 action characters in the mid-ground to form a combat faction ensemble. There needs to be a clear division of labor and posture differences among the characters, such as charging, holding a knife, casting spells, defending, summoning, jumping, standing guard, ranged attacking, etc. Avoid all characters standing still; a strong action rhythm and visual dynamic line must be formed.

Add enemy threats or worldview elements to the background, such as monsters, giant beasts, villain shadows, mechanical legions, demons, ruins, forests, alien spaces, battlefield smoke, or city disasters. The background threat should not overshadow the main subjects, but should wrap around the characters like shadows, enhancing the sense of crisis and narrative depth.

The image needs to set 1 to 2 high-saturation energy burst points, such as red flame fists, blue lightning, green curse aura, purple magic, golden divine light, or white blade light. Energy light effects should be concentrated on key characters or key weapons to form visual focal points, do not make the entire image glow evenly.

【Composition Method】
The overall structure adopts "Large Spiritual Core Character + Mid-ground Action Ensemble + Background Threat Shadow + Bottom or Side Blank Title Area". The image can use diagonal dynamic lines to organize characters, allowing the character ensemble to move from upper left to lower right, or rush from the bottom to the center, forming a strong sense of propulsion.

Retain an obvious blank title area, recommended to be located at the lower left, bottom, or side of the image. The blank area uses off-white, gray-white, light paper color, or low-saturation background color for placing [Brand Name / Work Name / Subtitle]. The title typography should have a sense of publication cover, using elegant serif fonts, retro title fonts, comic cover titles, or high-end magazine-style layouts. The text area must be clear and not completely obscured by characters and the background.

The edges of the illustration should not be a completely filled rectangle; irregular brush edges, ink diffusion, torn paper blank areas, or natural dissipation can be used, making the characters and background seem to grow out of the paper, enhancing the hand-drawn cover feel and artistic texture.

【Visual Style】
The overall style should be a combination of hand-painted impasto and comic covers, with paper texture, brushstroke feel, dark layer depth, and retro publication temperament. Light and shadow should be mainly low-key dark light, with the background darkened, character outlines clear, and local energy light providing high-contrast focal points. The image should not be overly clean, nor like ordinary smooth AI illustrations; it should retain hand-drawn textures, paper grains, edge brushstrokes, and dark fog.

Color-wise, adopt mainly low-saturation dark tones, supplemented by a small amount of high-saturation energy colors. The overall atmosphere should have a sense of oppression, mystery, combat, and worldview thickness.

【Image Goal】
The final image should look like a mature fantasy novel cover, comic special edition cover, game character faction main visual, or IP promotional poster. It needs to simultaneously possess:
1. A clear main visual character;
2. A character ensemble with action rhythm;
3. Clear enemy threats or worldview background;
4. Strong but restrained energy light effects;
5. A readable title text area;
6. The overall texture of a retro hand-drawn cover.

Please ensure the image information is rich but not chaotic, character hierarchy is clear, visual center of gravity is clear, reading path is natural, and it is suitable for subsequently replacing themes to continue generating works of the same series.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 暗黑风 · 群像图 · 战斗感 · 厚涂风 · 光效感

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-24

📎 **来源：** [@MrLarus](https://x.com/MrLarus/status/2047504255943094635)

</details>

超写实商业时尚风格广告，分为四个垂直面板，带有大胆、充满活力的背景（黄色、红色、绿色、蓝色），每个面板展示一位不同的年轻东亚女性自信地摆姿势。
面板1（黄色）：留着齐刘海和扎起头发的女性，穿着带有蕾丝细节的浅奶油色衬衫和黄色裙子，微微微笑，在靠近脸部的手指之间拿着一块小长方形巧克力。

背景中柔和流动的织物纹理与每个颜色面板相匹配，营造出丝绸般、充满动态的运动效果。明亮的影棚照明，高对比度，清晰的细节，光泽的商业摄影风格，锐利的焦点，干净的构图。

### 334. 高级技术蓝图风格信息图

<img src="images/ona_0208.jpg" alt="高级技术蓝图风格信息图" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
[
  对象
]的高级技术信息图。在一张专业且逼真的新照片中重新诠释主题，
照片干净明亮，
背景更合适且更具美感。保持物品作为真实照片，
而非插图。添加一个技术蓝图风格的叠加图，
包含白线、箭头、尺寸、标签以及零件、材料、尺寸和功能的小型示意图。清晰、优雅且信息丰富的文章。在左上角放置一个写有“OBJECT”的草图框。1：1 维度。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
[
  Object
] advanced technical infographic. Reinterpret the theme in a professional and realistic new photo,
the photo is clean and bright,
with a more suitable and aesthetic background. Keep the object as a real photo,
rather than an illustration. Add a technical blueprint style overlay,
containing white lines, arrows, dimensions, labels, and small diagrams of parts, materials, dimensions, and functions. A clear, elegant, and informative article. Place a sketch box in the upper left corner with "OBJECT" written on it. 1:1 dimensions.
```

### 337. 西门庆的一天百宫格分镜

<img src="images/ona_0211.jpg" alt="西门庆的一天百宫格分镜" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
西门庆游戏的100宫格分镜画面，10×10网格布局，1:1正方形画幅。

【网格布局】
100个等大的正方形格子，严格10行10列排列，格子间距均匀，专业游戏分镜风格。

【故事内容】
讲述明代富商西门庆完整的一天，从黎明到深夜：
第1-10格：破晓醒来，豪宅卧室，洗漱更衣
第11-20格：祠堂祭祖，庭院喂鱼，品茶看报
第21-30格：家族早餐，妻儿团聚，其乐融融
第31-40格：书房理账，管家汇报，准备出门
第41-50格：乘轿出行，繁华街市，前往商铺
第51-60格：药铺生意，检查药材，接待客户
第61-70格：丝绸仓库，验货议价，签约交易
第71-80格：拜访官员，送礼下棋，官商勾结
第81-90格：茶楼雅集，听曲赏画，文人应酬
第91-100格：夕阳归家，家宴团圆，掌灯就寝

【视觉风格】
电影级写实风格，明代历史高度还原，精致的服饰道具细节，戏剧性光影，远景中景特写细节镜头交替。

【色彩基调】
黎明：冷蓝调、淡金色
白天：暖黄、翠绿、朱红
傍晚：橙红、紫霞
夜晚：深蓝、灯笼红、月光银

【技术要求】
高分辨率，每格都是游戏CG级质量，构图专业多样，明代建筑服饰道具考据精准。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
100-grid storyboard frame of Ximen Qing game, 10×10 grid layout, 1:1 square aspect ratio.

【Grid Layout】
100 equal-sized square grids, strictly arranged in 10 rows and 10 columns, even spacing between grids, professional game storyboard style.

【Story Content】
Telling the complete day of the wealthy Ming Dynasty merchant Ximen Qing, from dawn to late night:
Grids 1-10: Waking up at dawn, luxury mansion bedroom, washing and dressing
Grids 11-20: Ancestral hall sacrifice, feeding fish in the courtyard, tasting tea and reading newspapers
Grids 21-30: Family breakfast, reunion with wife and children, happy and harmonious
Grids 31-40: Managing accounts in the study, steward reporting, preparing to go out
Grids 41-50: Traveling by sedan chair, bustling street market, heading to the shop
Grids 51-60: Pharmacy business, inspecting medicinal herbs, receiving customers
Grids 61-70: Silk warehouse, inspecting goods and bargaining, signing contracts and trading
Grids 71-80: Visiting officials, giving gifts and playing chess, collusion between officials and businessmen
Grids 81-90: Tea house elegant gathering, listening to music and appreciating paintings, socializing with literati
Grids 91-100: Returning home at sunset, family banquet reunion, lighting lamps and going to bed

【Visual Style】
Cinematic realistic style, high restoration of Ming Dynasty history, exquisite clothing and prop details, dramatic lighting and shadow, alternating between long shots, medium shots, close-up detail shots.

【Color Tone】
Dawn: Cold blue tone, pale gold
Daytime: Warm yellow, emerald green, vermilion
Dusk: Orange red, purple clouds
Night: Deep blue, lantern red, moonlight silver

【Technical Requirements】
High resolution, each grid is of game CG-level quality, professional and diverse composition, accurate research on Ming Dynasty architecture, clothing, and props.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 西门庆 · 百宫格 · 明代风 · 分镜图 · 电影感

📎 **来源：** [@ianneo_ai](https://x.com/ianneo_ai/status/2047260183769043119)

</details>

### 339. 红楼林黛玉史诗叙事海报

<img src="images/ona_0213_1.jpg" alt="红楼林黛玉史诗叙事海报" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0213_2.jpg" alt="红楼林黛玉史诗叙事海报" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
根据{红楼梦}自动生成一张 收藏版史诗叙事海报，

巨大优雅的{林黛玉}人物侧脸剪影作为外轮廓，剪影内部自动生长出最契合该主题的完整世界观、标志性场景、角色关系、象征符号、关键建筑、生物、道具与氛围。

整体不是普通拼贴，而是高级的剪影轮廓填充式叙事合成，带有双重曝光式联想，但强化为电影级叙事表达与空间调度。

电影海报风格 + 东方现实主义美学融合，强调真实物理光影、镜头语言、空间纵深与叙事层级。

光影采用电影级侧逆光与局部暖光点缀，冷暖对比克制真实，加入体积光与轻雾增强空间感。

材质表现为真实质感（建筑、丝绸、肌肤、石材），避免纯绘画笔触感，

保留柔和空气透视，但优化为电影级景深与焦点控制。

轻微胶片颗粒，边缘飞白与刷痕改为电影式柔和融合过渡，

大面积留白，版式克制高级，安静、宏大、克制、宿命感强的东方电影叙事。

所有元素必须强绑定主题，一眼识别，不要杂乱，不要硬拼贴，不要模板化背景，不要廉价奇幻素材。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on {Dream of the Red Chamber},

A giant and elegant side-profile silhouette of {Lin Daiyu} serves as the outer contour, inside which automatically grows the complete worldview, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic elements, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere that best fit the theme.

The overall design is not an ordinary collage, but a high-end silhouette contour-filled narrative composite, featuring double-exposure-like associations, yet intensified into cinematic narrative expression and spatial staging.

Movie poster style + Oriental realism aesthetic fusion, emphasizing realistic physical light and shadow, cinematic language, spatial depth, and narrative hierarchy.

The lighting adopts cinematic side-backlighting with local warm light accents, the cold-warm contrast is restrained and realistic, adding volumetric light and light mist to enhance the sense of space.

The materials are represented with realistic textures (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding a purely painted brushstroke feel,

Retaining soft aerial perspective, but optimized into cinematic depth of field and focus control.

Slight film grain, edge blank-keeping and brush strokes are changed to cinematic soft blending transitions,

Large areas of negative space, restrained and high-end layout, quiet, grand, restrained, Oriental cinematic narrative with a strong sense of fatalism.

All elements must be strongly bound to the theme, recognizable at a glance, no clutter, no hard collage, no templated backgrounds, no cheap fantasy assets.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 红楼梦 · 林黛玉 · 电影海报 · 剪影艺术 · 东方美学

### 341. 末日废土蓝胖子激战胖虎

<img src="images/ona_0215.jpg" alt="末日废土蓝胖子激战胖虎" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
一张高分辨率、照片级逼真的3D动作RPG手机游戏截图，展现了一场以哆啦A梦角色为特色的史诗级战斗。视角位于主要玩家角色大雄的后方。背景是一个后启示录的城市场景，包含碎石、碎裂的混凝土、钢筋、废墟、小火，以及在黑暗多云的夜空中强烈的紫色和蓝色闪电。角色：前景左侧：哆啦A梦，手里拿着一把精致的多管加特林式大炮，大炮闪烁着蓝色的能量光芒。前景中央：大雄，摆出战斗姿态，手持多层弹弓武器，穿着他经典的黄色衬衫、蓝色短裤，戴着眼镜。中景中央：巨型胖虎（Boss），体型巨大、肌肉发达、令人生畏，手持带刺的狼牙棒，长着发光的邪恶红眼，并被紫色能量特效包围。名牌：哆啦A梦（Lv. 30，HP: 2150/2420，MP: 860/1000），大雄（Lv. 30，HP: 1980/2200，MP: 900/1000），胖虎（Lv. ??，HP: 85670/100000，x4）。UI元素（全为英文）：左侧面板：标题为“MISSIONS”和“TEAM”。“MAIN QUEST”标题下是“Defeat Giant Gian”和“Defeat the Corrupted Gian [0/1]”。“DAILY TASKS”标题下是“Use skill to hit Gian 3 times (2/3) [Check]”、“Use item to restore HP 1 time (1/1) [Check]”和“Achieve 1 Perfect Dodge (0/1]”。右侧面板：“BOSS MISSION”标题下是“Defeat Giant Gian”和“Defeat the Corrupted Gian [0/1]”。右下角技能按钮：标签（从顶部顺时针）：“Heavy Strike”、“Basic Attack”（带有哆啦A梦头像）、“Bamboo Copter Flight”、“Item Bag”、“Tumble Dodge”。存在发光的蓝色技能图标。底部中央物品栏：物品上方是“STAMINA VALUE”，后面跟着“120/130”。物品为“Dorayaki (15)”、“Healing Drink (8)”、“Bamboo Copter (5)”、“Time Beam Camera (3)”。小地图：右上角带有骷髅图标的小地图。方向键：左下角的英文文本虚拟方向键。画面细节：电影级的光照和特效。哆啦A梦武器光芒的冷蓝色，温暖的橙色火光，冰冷的紫色闪电，以及胖虎邪恶的红眼。服装和武器上有细致的纹理。所有英文文本干净、清晰且准确。低角度强调了体型差异和战斗的紧张感。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
A high-resolution, photorealistic 3D action RPG mobile game screenshot of an epic battle featuring Doraemon characters. The perspective is from behind the main player character, Nobita. The background is a post-apocalyptic urban scene of rubble, crumbling concrete, rebar, debris, small fires, and intense purple and blue lightning in a dark, cloudy night sky.  Characters:  Foreground Left: Doraemon, holding an elaborate, multi-barrel gatling-style cannon which hums with blue energy in his hand.  Foreground Center: Nobita, in a combat stance with his multi-layered slingshot weapon, wearing his classic yellow shirt, blue shorts, and glasses.  Middle Ground Center: Giant Gian (the boss), massive, muscular, intimidating, holding a spiked mace, with glowing sinister red eyes and surrounded by purple energy effects.  Nameplates: Doraemon (Lv. 30, HP: 2150/2420, MP: 860/1000), Nobita (Lv. 30, HP: 1980/2200, MP: 900/1000), Gian (Lv. ??, HP: 85670/100000, x4).  UI Elements (All in English):  Left Side Panel: The title is "MISSIONS" and "TEAM". The "MAIN QUEST" header is followed by "Defeat Giant Gian" and "Defeat the Corrupted Gian [0/1]". The "DAILY TASKS" header is followed by "Use skill to hit Gian 3 times (2/3) [Check]", "Use item to restore HP 1 time (1/1) [Check]", and "Achieve 1 Perfect Dodge (0/1)".  Right Side Panel: The header "BOSS MISSION" is followed by "Defeat Giant Gian" and "Defeat the Corrupted Gian [0/1]".  Bottom Right Skill Buttons: Labels (clockwise from top): "Heavy Strike", "Basic Attack" (with Doraemon head), "Bamboo Copter Flight", "Item Bag", "Tumble Dodge". Glowing blue skill icons are present.  Bottom Center Item Bar: Above the items, "STAMINA VALUE" followed by "120/130". The items are "Dorayaki (15)", "Healing Drink (8)", "Bamboo Copter (5)", "Time Beam Camera (3)".  Mini-Map: Top right corner mini-map with skull icon.  D-pad: English text virtual D-pad on the bottom left.  Screen Details: Cinematic lighting and effects. The cool blue of Doraemon's weapon light, warm orange firelight, cold purple lightning, and Gian's sinister red eyes. Detailed textures on clothing and weapons. All English text is clean, legible, and accurate. The low-angle emphasizes the scale difference and battle tension.

### 342. 四轴无人机全尺寸工程图纸

<img src="images/ona_0216.jpg" alt="四轴无人机全尺寸工程图纸" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
四轴无人机 带尺寸工程图，包括不限于下面这些内容，记得角落做一些产品概念图

三视图：主视图、俯视图、左视图，用二维表达三维结构
零件图：每个零件单独画，带尺寸、孔位、材料、公差
装配图：说明各零件怎么装在一起
爆炸图 / 爆炸装配图：把零件拆开排布，方便看结构关系
剖视图：把内部结构切开表达
BOM 表：物料清单，写明零件名称、数量、规格
尺寸标注图：把可制造、可复刻需要的关键尺寸写全
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Quadcopter drone engineering drawing with dimensions, including but not limited to the following contents, remember to put some product concept drawings in the corners

Three-view drawing: front view, top view, left view, using 2D to express 3D structure
Part drawing: draw each part separately, with dimensions, hole positions, materials, tolerances
Assembly drawing: explain how each part is assembled together
Exploded view / exploded assembly drawing: disassemble and arrange the parts to easily see structural relationships
Cross-sectional view: cut open the internal structure for expression
BOM table: bill of materials, specifying part names, quantities, specifications
Dimensional annotation drawing: fully write out the key dimensions needed for manufacturability and replicability
```

### 343. 梦回江户浮世绘古典人物像

<img src="images/ona_0217_1.jpg" alt="梦回江户浮世绘古典人物像" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0217_2.jpg" alt="梦回江户浮世绘古典人物像" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
附加在此处的参考图像中人物的日式浮世绘肖像。保留他们的面部特征和相似度，同时将他们转化为传统的江户时代美学。使用平涂色块、粗犷的墨线轮廓、极少的阴影以及有纹理的纸张背景。将发型、服装和配饰设计为纯正的日本传统时尚，如和服图案。包含经典的浮世绘元素，如柔和的渐变、柔和的自然色调以及微妙的背景图案（波浪、云彩或花卉图案）。保持平静、沉着的表情和平衡的构图，面部微微倾斜，姿态优雅
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Japanese Ukiyo-e portrait of the person in the reference image attached here. Preserve their facial features and likeness while transforming them into a traditional Edo-period aesthetic. Use flat color blocks, bold ink outlines, minimal shading, and a textured paper background. Style the hair, clothing, and accessories in authentic Japanese traditional fashion such as kimono patterns. Include classic Ukiyo-e elements like soft gradients, muted natural tones, and subtle background motifs (waves, clouds, or floral patterns). Maintain a calm, composed expression and balanced composition, with a slightly angled face and elegant posture
```

### 345. 重生空间智女的电影海报

<img src="images/ona_0219.jpg" alt="重生空间智女的电影海报" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
基于轻小说，重生空间智女渲染：一张电影海报的拍摄剧照。主体：Yu Qi，以冷静、锐利的智慧为特征，穿着利落、极简的高级时尚剪裁；Long Hui，以沉稳、保护性的权威为特征，穿着结构化的炭灰色西装。场景：黄昏时分，一个光线昏暗的高端城市室内环境。摄影：使用35毫米胶片拍摄，低调照明，单束冷色调定向光投射出深邃、自然的阴影；浅景深模糊了背景建筑。氛围：微妙的、折射的几何光线扭曲漂浮在空中，暗示着一个先进的、隐藏的现实。细节：强调真实的皮肤纹理和织物编织，而不是数字光泽。排版：在底部居中，优雅的高对比度衬线字体写着'Reborn: Space Intelligent woman'，带有微妙的投影以匹配高级美学。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Grounded with the light novel, the Reborn space intelligence woman renders: 
A cinematic movie poster production still. Subjects: Yu Qi, characterised by a calm, piercing intelligence, wearing sharp, minimalist high fashion tailoring; 
Long Hui, characterised by a grounded, protective authority, wearing a structured, charcoal colored suit. 
Setting: A dimly lit, high end urban interior at dusk.Cinematography: Shot on 35mm film stock, low key lighting with a single cool toned directional light casting deep, natural shadows; shallow depth of field blurring the background architecture.Atmosphere: Subtle, refractive geometric light distortions floating in the air, hinting at an advanced, hidden reality.Detailing: Emphasise authentic skin texture and fabric weave rather than digital gloss.Typography: At the bottom, centred, elegant high contrast serif typeface reading 'Reborn: Space Intelligent woman', grounded with a subtle drop shadow to match the prestige aesthetic.
```

  "任务": "生成高质量的纵向科普百科图像",

  "格式": "纵向模块化科普信息图",
  "风格参考": [
    "高端自然历史插图",
    "现代百科页面",
    "生活知识卡片",
    "高度可分享的社交媒体信息图"
  ],
  "风格描述": "插图书美学结合百科结构、信息密度和收藏性。不是商业海报。",
  "必需视觉元素": {

  },

}

{
  "task": "Generate a high-quality vertical Popular Science Encyclopedia Image",

### 350. 复古韩风海报密室人像

<img src="images/ona_0224.jpg" alt="复古韩风海报密室人像" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
基于参考图像创作一幅电影感肖像：一名年轻男子坐在一个简单的凳子上，身处一个狭窄的房间内，该房间的墙壁、天花板和地板完全被复古韩国流行文化杂志页面和海报所覆盖。保持相同的居中构图、广角透视、低机位高度以及亲密的封闭房间感。主体放松地坐着，双膝分开，双手松散地放在大腿附近，平静地看向镜头。保留服装氛围：深炭灰色超大连帽衫，带有细微膝盖磨损的宽松褪色蓝色牛仔裤，干净的白色运动鞋。房间应该让人感到怀旧、具有杂志大片感且略带超现实主义，配有温暖的琥珀色头顶照明、柔和的阴影、柔和的色彩以及情绪化的地下音乐录影带氛围。使被杂志覆盖的表面在视觉上密集但有条理：分层的人物肖像、韩文标题、复古广告、褪色的印刷纹理、轻微的纸张褶皱、用胶带粘贴的边缘以及大小不一的海报。保持背景作为拼贴画的可读性，但不要求使用确切的真实文本；使用受韩文启发的排版和图形色块，而不创建可识别的受版权保护的杂志封面。照片写实，高细节，电影级调色，35毫米胶片质感，细微的颗粒感，逼真的皮肤纹理，自然的布料褶皱，深邃的透视线条，对称的房间几何形状，戏剧性但柔和的照明，4:5竖向肖像，制作级杂志大片摄影。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Create a cinematic portrait based on the reference image: a young man seated on a simple stool inside a narrow room completely covered in vintage Korean pop-culture magazine pages and posters, including the walls, ceiling, and floor. Keep the same centered composition, wide-angle perspective, low camera height, and intimate enclosed-room feeling. The subject sits relaxed with knees apart, hands resting loosely near the lap, looking calmly toward the camera.Preserve the outfit mood: oversized dark charcoal sweatshirt, loose faded blue jeans with subtle knee distressing, clean white sneakers. The room should feel nostalgic, editorial, and slightly surreal, with warm amber overhead lighting, soft shadows, muted colors, and a moody underground music-video atmosphere.Make the magazine-covered surfaces visually dense but organized: layered portraits, Korean headlines, retro advertisements, faded print texture, slight paper wrinkles, taped edges, and varied poster sizes. Keep the background readable as a collage but do not require exact real text; use Korean-inspired typography and graphic blocks without creating recognizable copyrighted magazine covers.Photorealistic, high-detail, cinematic color grading, 35mm film look, subtle grain, realistic skin texture, natural fabric folds, deep perspective lines, symmetrical room geometry, dramatic but soft lighting, 4:5 vertical portrait, production-grade editorial photography.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 韩流风 · 复古感 · 拼贴风 · 电影感 · 胶片风

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-24

📎 **来源：** [@de_mon010](https://x.com/de_mon010/status/2047149791713558687)

</details>

### 351. 夏日沙滩气泡水商业摄影

<img src="images/ona_0225.jpg" alt="夏日沙滩气泡水商业摄影" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
一罐冰冷气泡水直立放置在金色沙滩中的专业产品摄影照片。罐体呈银色和青色，覆盖着逼真的水滴冷凝，带有菠萝插图和热带品牌标识。罐体略微倾斜，栽种在一个精细金色沙子堆成的小土丘中，底部周围散落着微小的白色卵石和细小的绿色热带树叶/草。背景采用大胆的分屏构图 - 左侧是明亮的天蓝色，右侧是鲜艳的黄色，右侧罐子后面放置着一个大的模糊的真实菠萝。一片模糊的热带棕榈叶从左上角垂入，增加了景深和框架感。罐体表面可见宏观级别的冷凝水滴。照明明亮、充满活力，是具有干净阴影的商业影棚灯光。浅景深 - 罐体清晰对焦，背景柔和模糊。氛围：夏天、热带、清新、清爽。商业产品摄影，超细节，8K。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
A professional product photography shot of a cold sparkling water 
can placed upright in golden beach sand. The can is silver and teal, 
covered in realistic water droplets condensation, with a pineapple 
illustration and tropical branding. The can is slightly tilted, 
planted in a small mound of fine golden sand with tiny white pebbles 
and small green tropical leaves/grass scattered around the base. 
Background features a bold split composition - bright sky-blue on 
the left and vivid yellow on the right, with a large blurred real 
pineapple placed behind the can on the right side. A blurred tropical 
palm leaf drapes in from the upper left corner, adding depth and 
framing. Macro-level water condensation droplets visible on the 
can surface. Lighting is bright, vibrant, commercial studio lighting 
with clean shadows. Shallow depth of field - can in sharp focus, 
background softly blurred. Mood: summer, tropical, fresh, refreshing. 
Commercial product photography, ultra-detailed, 8K.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 气泡水 · 热带风 · 沙滩照 · 产品图 · 夏日感

### 354. 极简东方美学护肤广告大片

<img src="images/ona_0228.jpg" alt="极简东方美学护肤广告大片" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
极简东方高级广告风格，高端护肤品牌KV海报，品牌名“BRAND”，整体气质纯净、克制、科技感与东方美学融合

画面中心为一款高端精华产品，玻璃瓶身，通透渐变质感（上部透明→下部冷调青绿色），底部带液体光感，搭配香槟金金属瓶盖，产品放置于圆形高光底座之上，材质为抛光石材与金属结合，细节精致清晰，作为视觉绝对中心

产品周围环绕细腻金色能量光环与流动光带，形成轻微S型动线，象征修护与再生能量，光线从产品向外扩散，强化“功效视觉化”

一位东方女性位于画面后方偏右位置，半身回眸侧脸，气质冷静优雅，五官精致自然，冷白细腻肌肤呈现通透光泽（强调护肤效果），低饱和橘粉妆容，带微弱金色高光

黑色长发随风流动，发丝中融合金色光粒与微弱光带，整体干净克制不过度装饰，与产品光效形成呼应关系

身穿半透明丝绸服装与披肩，轻盈流动，材质通透，带细腻鎏金纹理与柔和反光，呈现高级质感

光影系统为干净暖金色主光源（侧后方），产品为主光聚焦点，人物为辅助受光，边缘光柔和，体积光轻微存在，空气中漂浮细小金色光粒，整体光线通透不过曝

背景为极简浅色渐变（米白+暖金过渡），大面积留白，画面干净无杂质，具备广告排版空间

画面下方加入冷调青绿色水面或矿物质质感元素（象征纯净科技与成分来源），增强品牌“纯净科技感”

色彩体系严格控制：主色为金色+米白，点缀冷调青绿色与香槟金，整体低饱和高级色调

构图为稳定中心构图+轻微S型动线，视觉聚焦明确，层级清晰（产品 > 光 > 人物）

整体风格：高端、纯净、修护再生、抗老科技感，国际大牌护肤广告质感（类似La Mer / SK-II级别）

超精细，8K质感，商业摄影级光影，真实材质表现

负面：产品变形，文字错误，过多装饰，画面拥挤，廉价金色，光影混乱，过曝，低清晰度
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Minimalist Oriental premium advertising style, high-end skincare brand KV poster, brand name "BRAND", overall aura pure, restrained, fusion of technological sense and Oriental aesthetics

In the center of the image is a high-end essence product, glass bottle body, transparent gradient texture (upper part transparent -> lower part cool-toned cyan-green), with liquid light sense at the bottom, paired with a champagne gold metal bottle cap, the product is placed on a circular highlight base, material is a combination of polished stone and metal, exquisite and clear details, serving as the absolute visual center

The product is surrounded by delicate golden energy halos and flowing light bands, forming a slight S-shaped dynamic line, symbolizing repair and regeneration energy, light diffuses outward from the product, strengthening "visualized efficacy"

An Oriental woman is located in the back-right position of the image, half-body looking back with a side face, calm and elegant temperament, exquisite and natural facial features, cold white delicate skin presenting a transparent luster (emphasizing skincare effects), low-saturation orange-pink makeup, with faint golden highlights

Black long hair flowing with the wind, golden light particles and faint light bands integrated into the hair strands, overall clean and restrained without excessive decoration, forming a echoing relationship with the product's light effects

Wearing translucent silk clothing and a shawl, light and flowing, transparent material, with delicate gold-gilded textures and soft reflections, presenting a premium texture

The lighting system is a clean warm golden main light source (side-rear), the product is the main light focus point, the character is auxiliary light-receiving, edge light is soft, volumetric light is slightly present, tiny golden light particles floating in the air, overall light is transparent without overexposure

The background is a minimalist light-color gradient (cream white + warm gold transition), large area of negative space, the image is clean without impurities, possessing advertising layout space

The bottom of the image adds cool-toned cyan-green water surface or mineral texture elements (symbolizing pure technology and ingredient sources), enhancing the brand's "pure technological sense"

Color system is strictly controlled: main colors are gold + cream white, embellished with cool-toned cyan-green and champagne gold, overall low-saturation premium tone

Composition is stable center composition + slight S-shaped dynamic line, visual focus is clear, hierarchy is clear (product > light > character)

Overall style: high-end, pure, repair and regeneration, anti-aging technological sense, international top-tier skincare advertising texture (similar to La Mer / SK-II level)

Ultra-fine, 8K texture, commercial photography-grade lighting, realistic material representation

Negative: product deformation, text errors, excessive decoration, crowded image, cheap gold, chaotic lighting, overexposure, low clarity
```

### 362. 真实微信聊天随手拍照片

<img src="images/ona_0236.jpg" alt="真实微信聊天随手拍照片" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
生成图片，比例3:4

一张真实拍摄的 iPhone 手机随手拍照片，手持拍摄，屏幕显示真实微信聊天界面，环境自然光，略带阳光反射，画面略微倾斜，生活化，不完美构图，真实感强，高细节，4K，屏幕玻璃表面有明显指纹、油渍、细小划痕，并带有自然反光、局部眩光和真实拍摄的屏幕污染感

参考图1作为我的头像
参考图2作为对方头像

联系人：[联系人名称]

聊天内容由GPT自行补充
要求是自然中文微信对话，符合真实聊天习惯，围绕这个主题展开：
[场景主题]

对话里要包含一个Word文件附件
文件名：[文件名].docx
文件大小：[文件大小]

界面必须像真实微信
左侧对方，右侧我
顶部栏、气泡、头像、时间分隔、留白都符合真实微信风格
底部输入栏必须严格为：
左侧语音按钮，中间白色长输入框，输入框内右侧麦克风图标，最右侧表情按钮和加号按钮

不要句号
不要多余空格
不要设计稿感
不要UI示意图感
要像真实手机拍出来的微信聊天照片
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Generate image, aspect ratio 3:4

A real shot iPhone casual photo, handheld shot, screen displays a real WeChat chat interface, environmental natural light, with slight sunlight reflection, slightly tilted frame, slice-of-life, imperfect composition, strong sense of reality, high detail, 4K, obvious fingerprints, oil stains, tiny scratches on the screen glass surface, with natural reflections, partial glare, and screen contamination feel of real photography

Reference image 1 as my avatar
Reference image 2 as the other party's avatar

Contact: [Contact Name]

Chat content is supplemented by GPT itself
Requirement is natural Chinese WeChat dialogue, conforming to real chat habits, revolving around this theme:
[Scene Theme]

The dialogue must include a Word file attachment
File name: [File Name].docx
File size: [File Size]

The interface must look like real WeChat
Left side is the other party, right side is me
Top bar, bubbles, avatars, time separation, whitespace all conform to real WeChat style
The bottom input bar must strictly be:
Left side voice button, middle white long input box, microphone icon on the right side inside the input box, rightmost emoji button and plus button

No periods
No extra spaces
No design draft feel
No UI schematic feel
Must look like a WeChat chat photo taken by a real phone
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 微信 · 随手拍 · 真实感 · 手机屏 · 生活化

📎 **来源：** [@xiaohu](https://x.com/xiaohu/status/2047221920186462428)

</details>

### 365. 极简几何风艺术产品海报

<img src="images/ona_0239_1.jpg" alt="极简几何风艺术产品海报" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0239_2.jpg" alt="极简几何风艺术产品海报" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
请为【主题产品】创作一张“极简几何装置风产品海报”。

如果我提供了产品图片，请以该图片为主要参考，保留产品的核心外观特征、包装形态、颜色、材质、品牌识别和整体气质，并优先沿用产品图中的主色调与配色关系进行设计。
如果我没有提供产品图片，请根据【主题产品】自动生成符合该产品定位的产品外观与包装设计，并根据产品属性、品类特征和气质，自动匹配自然合理的主色、辅助色、道具造型与展示方式。

海报整体风格要求：
画面采用高键白色或暖白色摄影棚背景，整体干净、通透、柔和、明亮，具有高级商业感与现代品牌视觉气质。构图不是普通电商棚拍，而是像品牌视觉提案、艺术静物摄影与3D产品陈列结合的概念海报。

画面主体应包含：
1. 【主题产品】本体
2. 产品包装
3. 与产品相关的原料、切片、部件、功能元素或材质细节

三者共同构成完整的视觉链路，使观者一眼就能理解“这是什么产品、内容是什么、卖点或来源是什么”。

场景中加入简洁且具有设计感的几何装置道具，例如：圆柱、方块、长条块、圆环、球体、半圆、平台、堆叠积木、亚克力支架、玩具感结构体等，用于承托、悬置、围绕或衬托产品主体，形成富有秩序感、节奏感和层次感的艺术陈列构图。

整体配色应围绕产品本身自然展开，以产品关联色为主视觉核心，搭配白色、奶油色、浅灰色等中性色，必要时加入少量辅助点缀色，使画面颜色统一、克制、舒适、清爽，不杂乱、不花哨。不同产品应自动适配不同配色，不固定使用某一种背景色。

材质表现要细腻真实，具有高质量商业渲染质感。透明塑料、亚克力、磨砂材质、纸质标签、玻璃、金属、光滑塑胶、果肉纹理、食材纹理或产品表面细节都应自然可信。可以有轻微反射与柔和阴影，但不要过重、不要脏乱。

构图要求留白充足，主体明确，画面平衡，视觉整洁，具有轻松、温和、现代、精致、亲和、带一点童趣但不幼稚的品牌气质。整体感觉像一张高审美的品牌产品KV海报，非常适合电商主视觉、社交媒体种草图、产品展示图。

输出要求：
- 竖版构图
-  比例
- 单张海报
- 高级感、简洁感、品牌感强
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Please create a "minimalist geometric installation style product poster" for the [Theme Product].
If I provide a product image, please use this image as the main reference, retain the product's core appearance features, packaging form, color, material, brand identity, and overall temperament, and prioritize adopting the main tone and color matching relationship from the product image for the design.
If I do not provide a product image, please automatically generate product appearance and packaging design that fits the positioning of the [Theme Product], and automatically match natural and reasonable main colors, auxiliary colors, prop shapes, and display methods based on the product attributes, category characteristics, and temperament.
Overall poster style requirements:
The image uses a high-key white or warm white photography studio background, overall clean, transparent, soft, and bright, with a premium commercial feel and modern brand visual temperament. The composition is not an ordinary e-commerce studio shot, but a conceptual poster combining brand visual proposals, artistic still life photography, and 3D product display.
The main subjects of the image should include:
1. The [Theme Product] itself
2. Product packaging
3. Raw materials, slices, components, functional elements, or material details related to the product
The three together form a complete visual chain, allowing viewers to understand at a glance "what this product is, what the content is, what the selling point or source is".
Add simple and design-sense geometric installation props to the scene, for example: cylinders, squares, long strips, rings, spheres, semicircles, platforms, stacked building blocks, acrylic stands, toy-like structures, used to support, suspend, surround, or set off the main product body, forming an artistic display composition rich in order, rhythm, and layering.
The overall color matching should naturally unfold around the product itself, with the product-related color as the main visual core, paired with neutral colors such as white, cream, and light gray, adding a small amount of auxiliary accent colors when necessary, making the picture colors unified, restrained, comfortable, and refreshing, not cluttered or flashy. Different products should automatically adapt to different color schemes, without fixedly using a certain background color.
The material expression should be delicate and realistic, with a high-quality commercial rendering texture. Transparent plastic, acrylic, frosted material, paper labels, glass, metal, smooth plastic, fruit flesh texture, food ingredient texture, or product surface details should all be natural and credible. There can be slight reflections and soft shadows, but they should not be too heavy or dirty and messy.
The composition requires sufficient white space, clear main subject, balanced picture, clean visuals, with a relaxed, gentle, modern, exquisite, approachable, slightly playful but not childish brand temperament. The overall feeling is like a high-aesthetic brand product KV poster, very suitable for e-commerce main visuals, social media seeding pictures, and product display pictures.
Output requirements:
- Vertical composition
-  Proportion
- Single poster
- Premium feel, simple feel, strong brand feel
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 极简风 · 几何感 · 高级感 · 陈列设计 · 商业海报

### 367. 敦煌神女残金壁画

<img src="images/ona_0241_1.jpg" alt="敦煌神女残金壁画" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0241_2.jpg" alt="敦煌神女残金壁画" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
请以 【主题】 为核心，创作一幅 敦煌壁画风的高端艺术画作。画面采用 构图方式，以主体角色为唯一主视觉核心，表现其核心动作 / 情境的神圣瞬间。整体氛围应为 整体氛围，具有博物馆级审美、文化厚度与收藏级艺术感。

主体形象要求：
主体角色应呈现出优雅庄严、修长华贵、神性强烈的气质，姿态舒展，具有鲜明的敦煌壁画式神圣性与仪式感。面容需静穆、圣洁、含蓄、不可侵犯，带有敦煌壁画中神女 / 菩萨 / 飞天式的庄严气质，而不是普通古风美女。
发髻高挽，佩戴复杂精美的 金饰发冠、珠链步摇、耳饰、璎珞、臂钏、腰饰，服饰华丽，衣纹流畅，线条细劲有力，富有飞天韵律与宫廷级壁画质感。衣袂、飘带、裙摆与袖口应形成富有节奏感的流动曲线，强化神圣升腾感与画面韵律。

用金结构要求：
画面需强化 结构性用金，不是零散点金，而是形成明确的奢华秩序：
主体角色的发冠、首饰、衣缘、袖口、腰封、飘带边线、裙摆纹样采用 描金、泥金、鎏金、金线刺绣、残损金箔痕迹；
核心神圣元素，如月轮 / 佛光 / 法轮 / 宝盖 / 莲台、云纹、莲花花瓣、宝相花、藻井纹饰、团花纹、边框装饰也应带有 清晰可见但克制高级的金色装饰；
整体呈现 金碧辉煌但不俗艳、富丽精工但不廉价 的效果，表现出历经千年风化后仍保有金碧辉煌余韵的 残损奢华感。

色彩要求：
色彩以 赭红、朱砂、青绿、石青、石绿、土黄、象牙白 为主，辅以克制精致的 土金、鎏金。
整体色调要 浓郁、浑厚、古雅、贵气，避免轻飘糖水色。
背景可采用 背景主色氛围，如深邃石青天幕 / 温润古壁底色 / 暗金矿物底色与古壁肌理结合，衬托出主体的神圣与尊贵。

装饰元素要求：
画面可融入 飞天、莲花、宝相花、藻井、祥云、伎乐、团花纹、楼阁宫阙、法器、圣光圆轮、古典边框装饰 等典型敦煌视觉语言，但必须围绕主体集中分布，层级清晰，避免平均铺满全画面。
陪衬人物控制在 陪衬人数位即可，作为礼赞与陪衬，分布在主体周围或下方，形成朝向主体的仪式感动势。她们可陪衬动作，如持莲花 / 奏琵琶 / 吹笛 / 奉花 / 托灯 / 执幡，线条轻盈流动，与主体形成呼应，但不可喧宾夺主。

空间与构图要求：
构图中应保留适度的 云气空间、圣光留白、月光或天幕留白，让画面有呼吸感。
核心神圣元素需醒目、庄严、圆满，周围可有 鎏金光晕、圣光圆轮、细密金线轨迹，强化主题的神圣性。
远处可点缀远景元素，如月宫楼阁 / 云中宫阙 / 佛国建筑 / 仙界天幕，但不可过多，以增强空间层次与仙界气息。

材质表现要求：
需强调古老石窟壁画与矿物颜料肌理：
可见 斑驳、裂纹、风化、轻微剥落、历史包浆、粉化边缘、古壁肌理；
同时保留局部 描金、残损金箔、磨蚀后的鎏金光泽，形成 “旧而贵、残而华、古而神圣” 的高级艺术质感。
整体要求：华丽、细腻、神秘、庄严、统一、收藏级、艺术化、高级感极强。

负面约束词：
避免现代国潮风，避免商业插画感，避免普通古风美女插画，避免动漫感，避免网红审美，避免塑料质感，避免廉价土豪金，避免金色过亮过俗，避免荧光色，避免过度饱和，避免人物过多，避免背景元素过满，避免装饰平均铺满全画面，避免碎花感过重，避免视觉主次不清，避免主体不突出，避免低级堆砌感，避免平庸感，避免轻浮感，避免现代服装感，避免摄影感，避免3D建模塑料感。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Please take [Theme] as the core to create a high-end artwork in the style of Dunhuang murals. The picture adopts [Composition Method] composition method, taking the main character as the only main visual core, expressing the sacred moment of its core action / situation. The overall atmosphere should be [Overall Atmosphere], possessing museum-level aesthetics, cultural thickness, and collectible artistic sense.

Main character image requirements:
The main character should present an elegant and solemn, slender and luxurious, strongly divine temperament, with stretched posture, having the distinct sacredness and ritual sense of Dunhuang murals. The face needs to be serene, holy, subtle, and inviolable, carrying the solemn temperament of goddesses / bodhisattvas / flying apsaras in Dunhuang murals, rather than ordinary ancient style beauties.
Hair styled in a high bun, wearing complex and exquisite gold hair crowns, beaded chain buyao, earrings, yingluo (necklaces), armlets, waist ornaments, with gorgeous clothing, smooth clothing lines, fine and vigorous lines, full of flying apsara rhythm and court-level mural texture. The hem of the garment, flowing ribbons, skirt hem, and cuffs should form rhythmic flowing curves, strengthening the sense of sacred ascension and picture rhythm.

Gold structure requirements:
The picture needs to strengthen structural use of gold, not scattered gold dots, but forming a clear luxurious order:
The main character's hair crown, jewelry, clothing edges, cuffs, waist seal, ribbon edge lines, and skirt patterns adopt gold tracing, mud gold, gilded gold, gold thread embroidery, damaged gold foil traces;
Core sacred elements, such as moon wheel / buddha light / dharma wheel / precious canopy / lotus seat, cloud patterns, lotus petals, baoxiang flowers, caisson decorations, tuanhua patterns, border decorations should also have clearly visible but restrained and high-end golden decorations;
The overall presentation should have a resplendent but not vulgar, gorgeously crafted but not cheap effect, expressing the damaged luxury sense that still retains the lingering charm of resplendence after thousands of years of weathering.

Color requirements:
Colors are mainly ochre red, cinnabar, cyan-green, azurite, mineral green, earth yellow, ivory white, supplemented by restrained and exquisite earth gold, gilded gold.
The overall tone should be rich, mellow, antique, and noble, avoiding light and floating syrupy colors.
The background can adopt [Background Main Color Atmosphere], such as a deep azurite sky curtain / warm ancient wall base color / dark gold mineral base color combined with ancient wall texture, setting off the sacredness and nobility of the main body.

Decorative element requirements:
The picture can integrate typical Dunhuang visual languages such as flying apsaras, lotus flowers, baoxiang flowers, caissons, auspicious clouds, musicians, tuanhua patterns, pavilions and palaces, dharma instruments, holy light round wheels, and classical border decorations, but they must be centrally distributed around the main body with clear hierarchy, avoiding evenly spreading across the whole picture.
Supporting characters should be controlled to [Number of Supporting Characters] positions, serving as praise and foil, distributed around or below the main body, forming a ritualistic momentum facing the main body. They can have supporting actions, such as holding a lotus / playing a pipa / blowing a flute / offering flowers / holding a lamp / holding a banner, with light and flowing lines, echoing the main body, but must not overshadow the main subject.

Space and composition requirements:
The composition should retain moderate cloud space, holy light blank space, moonlight or sky curtain blank space, giving the picture a sense of breathing.
Core sacred elements need to be eye-catching, solemn, and complete, surrounded by gilded halos, holy light round wheels, and dense gold line trajectories, strengthening the sacredness of the theme.
Distant view elements can be embellished in the distance, such as moon palace pavilions / pavilions in the clouds / buddhist realm architecture / fairy realm sky curtain, but not too many, to enhance the spatial hierarchy and fairy realm atmosphere.

Material expression requirements:
Need to emphasize ancient grotto murals and mineral pigment textures:
Visible mottling, cracks, weathering, slight peeling, historical patina, pulverized edges, ancient wall textures;
At the same time, retain local gold tracing, damaged gold foil, and abraded gilded luster, forming a high-end artistic texture of "old but noble, damaged but gorgeous, ancient but sacred".

Overall requirements: gorgeous, delicate, mysterious, solemn, unified, collectible, artistic, extremely strong sense of high-end.

Negative constraint words:
Avoid modern national trend style, avoid commercial illustration sense, avoid ordinary ancient style beauty illustration, avoid anime sense, avoid internet celebrity aesthetics, avoid plastic texture, avoid cheap nouveau riche gold, avoid gold being too bright and too vulgar, avoid fluorescent colors, avoid over-saturation, avoid too many characters, avoid background elements being too full, avoid decorations evenly spreading across the whole picture, avoid overly heavy floral sense, avoid unclear visual primary and secondary, avoid unhighlighted main body, avoid low-level stacking sense, avoid mediocrity sense, avoid frivolity sense, avoid modern clothing sense, avoid photography sense, avoid 3D modeling plastic sense.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 敦煌风 · 矿物彩 · 残金感 · 古壁画 · 神圣感

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

📎 **来源：** [@MrLarus](https://x.com/MrLarus/status/2046845640580239567)

</details>

### 368. 十八名家丹青绘山城朝天门

<img src="images/ona_0242.jpg" alt="十八名家丹青绘山城朝天门" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
请创作一张原创的中文艺术策展海报，主题为《不同画家笔下的重庆朝天门》。

内容设定：
以18位中国画家为灵感来源，分别用不同艺术风格来表现“重庆朝天门”这一同一主题。每一幅小画面都围绕重庆朝天门展开，体现两江交汇、码头、江岸城市、山城层叠建筑、船只、水雾、城市天际线等特征。注意：必须是重庆朝天门，不要出现上海东方明珠。

18位画家如下：
顾恺之、吴道子、王希孟、倪瓒、沈周、仇英、齐白石、张大千、徐悲鸿、林风眠、傅抱石、李可染、吴冠中、黄永玉、范曾、周春芽、曾梵志、刘小东。

风格方向：
- 顾恺之：线描飘逸、设色淡雅、古意人物与山水结合
- 吴道子：奔放墨线、气势强烈、动态感强
- 王希孟：青绿山水、宏阔精丽、矿物色华美
- 倪瓒：疏淡空灵、文人山水、留白明显
- 沈周：温润文人笔墨、层次丰富
- 仇英：工笔重彩、精致繁丽、叙事感强
- 齐白石：笔墨简练、色彩鲜活、天真生动
- 张大千：泼墨泼彩、气象开阔
- 徐悲鸿：中西融合、造型严谨
- 林风眠：现代中国绘画、色块概括、诗意朦胧
- 傅抱石：笔墨奔放、氤氲厚重
- 李可染：积墨深厚、层次沉稳
- 吴冠中：形式感强、点线面构成鲜明
- 黄永玉：灵动明快、色彩跳跃
- 范曾：文人气、书写性强、人物意味浓厚
- 周春芽：表现性强、色彩浓烈、带花卉意象
- 曾梵志：情绪张力强、厚重笔触、都市感
- 刘小东：写实油画、现场感、人物与江边生活结合

排版要求：
不要模仿任何已有图片的版式，不要使用表格对照图结构，不要复刻示例海报。
请设计成“原创策展海报”形式，可以采用更自由、更高级的美术馆展陈排版：
- 画面为横向大幅
- 整体分为古代、近现代、当代三个章节
- 每个章节内以若干小幅作品和文字标签自由编排
- 版面具有展览感、出版物感、策展设计感
- 文字为中文
- 标题大字：不同画家笔下的重庆朝天门
- 可加入简短作品说明与风格关键词
- 底部加入小字说明：以上作品为AI依据不同画家艺术语言进行风格化创作，仅供艺术欣赏与学习交流

视觉要求：
高级、克制、学术气质、美术馆出版物风格、纸本质感、留白舒适、排版精致、细节丰富、4K高清。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Please create an original Chinese art curation poster with the theme "Chongqing Chaotianmen Under the Brushes of Different Painters".

Content setting: Taking 18 Chinese painters as sources of inspiration, using different art styles to express the same theme of "Chongqing Chaotianmen". Each small picture revolves around Chongqing Chaotianmen, reflecting the characteristics of the confluence of two rivers, docks, riverside cities, stacked buildings of the mountain city, boats, water mist, city skylines. Note: It must be Chongqing Chaotianmen, do not show Shanghai Oriental Pearl Tower.

The 18 painters are as follows: Gu Kaizhi, Wu Daozi, Wang Ximeng, Ni Zan, Shen Zhou, Qiu Ying, Qi Baishi, Zhang Daqian, Xu Beihong, Lin Fengmian, Fu Baoshi, Li Keran, Wu Guanzhong, Huang Yongyu, Fan Zeng, Zhou Chunya, Zeng Fanzhi, Liu Xiaodong.

Style directions:
- Gu Kaizhi: Flowing line drawing, elegant coloring, combination of ancient figures and landscapes
- Wu Daozi: Bold ink lines, strong momentum, strong sense of dynamics
- Wang Ximeng: Blue-green landscape, grand and exquisite, magnificent mineral colors
- Ni Zan: Sparse and ethereal, literati landscape, obvious blank space
- Shen Zhou: Gentle literati brush and ink, rich layers
- Qiu Ying: Fine brushwork and heavy color, exquisite and gorgeous, strong sense of narrative
- Qi Baishi: Concise brush and ink, vivid colors, naive and lively
- Zhang Daqian: Splashed ink and splashed color, broad atmosphere
- Xu Beihong: Integration of Chinese and Western, rigorous modeling
- Lin Fengmian: Modern Chinese painting, summarized color blocks, poetic haziness
- Fu Baoshi: Bold brush and ink, misty and thick
- Li Keran: Deep accumulated ink, calm layers
- Wu Guanzhong: Strong sense of form, distinct composition of points, lines, and planes
- Huang Yongyu: Agile and bright, jumping colors
- Fan Zeng: Literati spirit, strong calligraphic quality, strong figure flavor
- Zhou Chunya: Strong expressiveness, intense colors, with flower imagery
- Zeng Fanzhi: Strong emotional tension, thick brushstrokes, urban sense
- Liu Xiaodong: Realistic oil painting, sense of being on the scene, combination of figures and riverside life

Layout requirements: Do not imitate the layout of any existing images, do not use a table comparison structure, do not replicate sample posters.
Please design it in the form of an "original curation poster", and you can adopt a more free and advanced art gallery exhibition layout:
- The picture is horizontally large
- The overall picture is divided into three chapters: ancient, modern and contemporary
- Within each chapter, several small works and text labels are freely arranged
- The layout has a sense of exhibition, publication, and curation design
- The text is in Chinese
- Large title text: Chongqing Chaotianmen Under the Brushes of Different Painters
- Short work descriptions and style keywords can be added
- Add small text explanation at the bottom: The above works are stylized creations by AI based on the artistic languages of different painters, and are only for art appreciation and learning exchange

Visual requirements: High-end, restrained, academic temperament, art gallery publication style, paper texture, comfortable blank space, exquisite layout, rich details, 4K high definition.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 朝天门 · 艺术展 · 山水画 · 重庆城 · 名家作

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

📎 **来源：** [@xiaoerzhan](https://x.com/xiaoerzhan/status/2046984876336058603)

</details>

### 369. 濒危动物科普信息图设计

<img src="images/ona_0243.jpg" alt="濒危动物科普信息图设计" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
创建一个关于濒危动物的中文视觉丰富信息图。首先在网上找一个，研究它的栖息地、饮食和独特特征。通过带注释的视觉元素和结构化的标注来呈现信息，而不是通用的部分。风格要像大胆的图形插画：一个详细的、逼真的中心动物作为焦点，由图表、标注和简洁的文本元素支持。使用干净的背景，并在分层构图中混合使用逼真效果与强烈的图形元素（形状、图标、色块）。使其密集、有触感且专业制作。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Create a visually rich infographic in Chinese about an endangered animal. Start by finding one online, research its habitat, diet, and unique traits. Present information through annotated visuals and structured callouts, not generic sections. Style it like a bold graphic illustration: a detailed, photorealistic central animal as the focal point, supported by diagrams, callouts, and concise text elements. Use clean backgrounds and a mix of photorealism with strong graphic elements (shapes, icons, color blocking) in a layered composition. Make it dense, tactile, and professionally authored.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 信息图 · 濒危动物 · 逼真插画 · 图形设计 · 科普图鉴

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

### 370. iX未来科技品牌设计套件

<img src="images/ona_0244.jpg" alt="iX未来科技品牌设计套件" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
为一家名为 iX 的公司制作一份精致的多页品牌套件，其中每一页都作为一个专属的产品展示，展示一款不同的高科技小工具。
该品牌应感觉俏皮、未来主义、充满活力且具有设计前瞻性，将玩具启发产品的能量与高端创意科技品牌的精致感相融合。使用大胆、实验性的视觉识别，具有明亮的色彩、简洁的几何形状、现代的排版、动态的运动暗示和略带超现实主义的意象。
对于每张图像，聚焦一款独特、富有创意的小工具——例如未来主义的可穿戴设备、触觉音频设备或超现实的家庭科技产品——以编辑化、以产品为中心的版式呈现。整体氛围应感觉富有创意、年轻、有节奏感且具有高概念，在有趣的消费文化与时尚般的呈现之间取得平衡。通过特写的视觉实验、创新的包装探索和跨平台应用，包含一种对产品的痴迷感。让它感觉像一个自信、当代的品牌世界，既平易近人又具有艺术指导感，具有强烈的图形凝聚力和高端创意工作室的美学。
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Create a polished multi-page brand kit for a company called iX, where each page functions as a dedicated product showcase featuring a different high-tech gadget.
The brand should feel playful, futuristic, vibrant, and design-forward, blending the energy of a toy-inspired product with the sophistication of a premium creative tech brand. Use a bold, experimental visual identity with bright color, clean geometry, modern typography, dynamic motion cues, and slightly surreal imagery.
For each image, spotlight a unique, inventive gadget—such as futuristic wearables, tactile audio devices, or surreal home-tech—presented in an editorial, product-focused layout. The overall mood should feel inventive, youthful, rhythmic, and high-concept, balancing fun consumer culture with fashion-like presentation. Include a sense of product obsession through close-up visual experimentation, innovative packaging exploration, and cross-platform application. Make it feel like a confident, contemporary brand world that is both accessible and art-directed, with strong graphic cohesion and a premium creative-studio aesthetic.
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 品牌册 · 未来感 · 产品展 · 超现实 · 创意风

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

📎 **来源：** [@iX00AI](https://x.com/iX00AI/status/2046928375076536380)

</details>

### 372. 照片上的手写英语单词笔记

<img src="images/ona_0246.jpg" alt="照片上的手写英语单词笔记" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
【任务目标】
在照片中识别 5 个物品，并为每个物品添加：

1. 英文单词
2. 简单英文释义
3. 可选的简短例句

【标注数量】

* 只标记 5 个物品
* 不要超过 5 个
* 优先选择日常生活中常见、容易学习的物品
* 如果画面里物品很多，只挑最典型的 5 个

【画法要求】

* 用白色细线手绘风格标注
* 线条像随手画上去的，一笔画感
* 沿着物体边缘轻轻描一圈轮廓
* 可以加少量箭头、虚线辅助指向
* 不要太工整，保持自然松弛感
* 不要把画面画满，保留留白

【文字格式】
每个物品旁边写：

* 英文单词
* 一句简单英文解释
* 可选一句简短例句

参考格式：

coffee
a drink you can have in the morning
Example: I drink coffee every day.

bread
soft food made from flour
Example: I had bread for breakfast.

【文字风格】

* 以英文为主
* 解释要简单，适合初学者
* 不要写得像词典
* 更像看图学单词的小笔记
* 单词更突出，解释和例句稍小一点

【整体感觉】

* 像日常照片上的英语学习手写注释
* 清爽、自然、有留白
* 像社交媒体上的轻学习内容
* 不要太复杂，不要太满，不要太装饰化

【输出重点】
重点是：
只选 5 个物品 → 标英文单词 → 配简单用法解释 → 让整张图看起来轻松自然。

Make the aspect ratio 9:16
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
[Task Objective]
Identify 5 objects in the photo, and add for each object:

1. English word
2. Simple English definition
3. Optional short example sentence

[Number of Annotations]

* Only mark 5 objects
* Do not exceed 5
* Prioritize common, easy-to-learn objects from daily life
* If there are many objects in the picture, only pick the 5 most typical ones

[Drawing Style Requirements]

* Use white thin line hand-drawn style for annotations
* Lines should look casually drawn, with a single-stroke feel
* Lightly trace a circle of outline along the edge of the object
* Can add a small number of arrows and dashed lines to assist in pointing
* Do not make it too neat, maintain a natural and relaxed feel
* Do not fill the picture, keep white space

[Text Format]
Write next to each object:

* English word
* A simple English explanation
* An optional short example sentence

Reference format:

coffee
a drink you can have in the morning
Example: I drink coffee every day.

bread
soft food made from flour
Example: I had bread for breakfast.

[Text Style]

* Mainly in English
* Explanations should be simple, suitable for beginners
* Do not write like a dictionary
* More like small notes for learning words from pictures
* Words should be more prominent, explanations and example sentences slightly smaller

[Overall Vibe]

* Like handwritten English learning annotations on daily photos
* Clean, natural, with white space
* Like light learning content on social media
* Not too complex, not too full, not too decorative

[Output Focus]
The focus is:
Only select 5 objects → label English words → pair with simple usage explanations → make the whole picture look relaxed and natural.

Make the aspect ratio 9:16
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 手绘 · 学单词 · 轻学习 · 极简风 · 手写体

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

📎 **来源：** [@cheerselflin](https://x.com/cheerselflin/status/2047247352029983055)

</details>

---

### 373. 小红书手绘照片注释风

<img src="images/ona_0247_1.jpg" alt="小红书手绘照片注释风" width="600"/>

<img src="images/ona_0247_2.jpg" alt="小红书手绘照片注释风" width="600"/>


<details>
<summary>📋 查看提示词</summary>

**🇨🇳 中文提示词：**
```
请观察照片中的元素，并为每个元素添加有意义的手绘注释。
【画面里的东西】
把照片里的物品简单列出来（比如：冰美式、面包、窗边、阳光）
【画法要求】
・用白色细线，像手绘笔一样
・一笔画风格，线条随意一点，不要太工整
・沿着物体边缘轻轻描一圈轮廓
・适当加箭头 / 虚线，引导视线
【文字风格】
・中文手写感，偏口语一点
・句子要短，像随手写的
・语气像日常碎碎念 / 小情绪
【内容怎么写】
・饮品 → 味道 / 温度 / 当下感觉（例：冰冰的，好清爽）
・食物 → 口感 / 好不好吃（例：软软的，有点惊喜）
・环境 → 氛围（例：有点安静，很适合发呆）
・整体 → 一句总结（例：今天也算被治愈了）
【小装饰】
・可以加一点点：热气、小星星、爱心、简单表情（比如：:)）
・不要太多，留一点空白更好看
【整体感觉】
・像小红书日常分享 / 随手记录
・自然、不用太精致，有点松弛感
```

**🌐 英文提示词：**
```
Please observe the elements in the photo, and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations for each element.
【Elements in the picture】
Simply list the items in the photo (for example: iced Americano, bread, by the window, sunlight)
【Drawing requirements】
- Use white thin lines, like a hand-drawn pen
- One-stroke style, lines should be a bit casual, not too neat
- Lightly trace a circle of outline along the edge of the object
- Appropriately add arrows / dashed lines to guide the line of sight
【Text style】
- Chinese handwritten feel, a bit more colloquial
- Sentences should be short, like casually written ones
- Tone like daily murmurs / little emotions
【How to write the content】
- Drinks -> taste / temperature / current feeling (example: icy, so refreshing)
- Food -> texture / whether it is delicious or not (example: soft, a bit of a surprise)
- Environment -> atmosphere (example: a bit quiet, very suitable for zoning out)
- Overall -> a one-sentence summary (example: today counts as being healed too)
【Small decorations】
- Can add a little bit: heat vapor, little stars, hearts, simple expressions (for example: :))
- Don't add too much, leaving some blank space looks better
【Overall feeling】
- Like Xiaohongshu daily sharing / casual recording
- Natural, doesn't need to be too exquisite, has a bit of a relaxed feeling
```

**🏷️ 标签：** 手绘风 · 碎碎念 · 松弛感 · 随手拍 · 治愈系

**📅 发布时间：** 2026-04-23

📎 **来源：** [@GeekCatX](https://x.com/GeekCatX/status/2047253398307975283)

</details>
